title: Raycast
description: Raycast is a fast app launcher and productivity tool for macOS with extensions, clipboard history, window management, and automation.

title: Alfred
description: Alfred boosts productivity with hotkeys, keyword searches, workflows, and clipboard history for faster navigation on macOS.

title: Bartender
description: Bartender organizes and hides menu bar icons so your macOS menu bar stays clean and uncluttered.

title: Übersicht
description: Übersicht lets you place customizable widgets directly on your macOS desktop using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

title: OnyX
description: OnyX is a powerful macOS maintenance and customization tool for cleaning caches, verifying disks, and tweaking hidden system settings.

title: GrandPerspective
description: GrandPerspective visualizes disk usage using tree maps so you can easily locate large files and folders.

title: AppCleaner
description: AppCleaner removes apps completely by deleting leftover files that macOS normally leaves behind.

title: CleanShot X
description: CleanShot X is an advanced screenshot and screen recording tool with annotations, scrolling capture, and cloud sharing.

title: Obsidian
description: Obsidian is a powerful knowledge base and note-taking app built around Markdown with graph visualization.

title: AltTab
description: AltTab brings a Windows-style Alt+Tab window switcher to macOS with previews and customization.

title: IINA
description: IINA is a modern macOS media player built on mpv with gesture controls, dark mode, and native macOS design.

title: Rocket
description: Rocket lets you type emojis quickly using Slack-style shortcuts like :fire: or :rocket: on macOS.

title: AltStore
description: AltStore is the home for apps that push iOS boundaries—install apps outside the App Store, no jailbreak required.

title: Sideloadly
description: Sideload your favorite games and apps on iOS, Apple Silicon Macs, and Apple TV without jailbreak.

title: iMazing
description:
iMazing is the world’s most trusted software to transfer and save your messages, music, files and data from your iPhone or iPad to your Mac or PC.
Gain powerful backup, data extraction, media, and file transfer capabilities, and much more with iMazing.
